sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90430" key="proswpolhpte/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσωπο-ληπτέω</orth>, (v. <sense id="n90430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόσωπον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a respecter of persons,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Jac.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
